calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-10-2020 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-03-2019 Continued To Jan-29-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Dec-09-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Emily Collins, Esq. of HUNT & HENRIQUES, T:408.360.8485, for plaintiff/moving party, on Court Call;
Argentina Sanchez, T:925.848.5366, defendant in pro per, appearing on her own behalf.

RULING: When questioned by the Court, defendant states that she has no objection to the amount awarded to the plaintiff. The issue of including costs in the judgment was discussed and argued by the plaintiff. After hearing, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A.'s Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings, as follows:

Plaintiff Citibank. N.A.'s motion for judgment on the pleadings is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Citibank has shown that it is entitled to judgment in its favor and against defendant Argentina Sanchez in the amount of $6,047.57.

Order signed. Moving party to prepare and submit a proposed judgment.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted
Off Calendar Oct-07-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty Emily B. Collins of Hunt & Henriques t: 408.360.8485 for plaintiff;
No other appearances.

RULING - PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A.'S Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted is unopposed and GRANTED; order signed in open Court. Proceedings not reported; Judge: Scott Borrowman; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany (JPT/302).
